title.ar: دليل أنظمة طلاء المثبتات: الزنك، الجلفنة، داكروميت
title.fr: Guide des Systèmes de Revêtement des Fixations: Zinc, Galvanisation, Dacromet
title.pt: Guia de Sistemas de Revestimento de Fixadores: Zinco, Galvanização, Dacromet
title.ru: Руководство по Системам Покрытия Крепежа: Цинк, Оцинковка, Dacromet
title.ja: ファスナーコラーシングシステムガイド：ジンク、ガルバニック、ダクロメット
title.hi: फास्टनर कोटिंग सिस्टम गाइड: जिंक, गैल्वनाइजिंग, डैक्रोमेट

description.en: Complete guide to fastener coating systems. Learn about zinc plating, hot-dip galvanizing, Dacromet, and other coatings for corrosion protection.
description.zh: 紧固件涂层系统完整指南。了解电镀锌、热镀锌、达克罗和其他防腐涂层。
description.es: Guía completa de sistemas de recubrimiento de sujetadores. Aprenda sobre zincado, galvanizado en caliente, Dacromet y otros recubrimientos.
description.ar: دليل شامل لأنظمة طلاء المثبتات. تعلم عن الزنك الكهربائي والطلاء الساخن وداكروميت والطلاءات الأخرى للحماية.
description.fr: Guide complet des systèmes de revêtement des fixations. Apprenez le zingage, la galvanisation à chaud, le Dacromet et d'autres revêtements.
description.pt: Guia completo de sistemas de revestimento de fixadores. Aprenda sobre zincagem, galvanização a quente, Dacromet e outros revestimentos.
description.ru: Полное руководство по системам покрытия крепежа. Узнайте о цинковании, горячей оцинковке, Dacromet и других покрытиях.
description.ja: ファスナーコラーシングシステムの完全ガイド。電気めっき、溶融亜鉛めっき、ダクロメット、その他の防腐 코팅제에 대해 알아봅니다.
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Fastener Beschichtungssysteme. Erfahren Sie mehr über Zinkplattierung, Feuerverzinkung, Dacromet.
description.hi: फास्टनर कोटिंग सिस्टम की पूर्ण गाइड। जिंक प्लेटिंग, हॉट-डिप गैल्वनाइजिंग, डैक्रोमेट के बारे में जानें।

keywords: fastener coating, zinc plating, hot-dip galvanizing, Dacromet, corrosion protection, plating

body.en:
Zinc electroplating is the most common coating:

Process:
- Electrolytic deposition of zinc onto fastener
- Typical thickness: 8-12 microns
- Clear or colored passivate top coat

Properties:
- Good corrosion protection in mild environments
- Low cost
- Good appearance
- Some hydrogen embrittlement risk

Applications:
- Indoor applications
- Mild outdoor exposure
- Automotive under-hood
- General manufacturing

TradeGo zinc plated fasteners meet ASTM F1941 specifications.

Hot-dip galvanizing provides excellent corrosion protection:

Process:
- Fasteners dipped in molten zinc (450°C)
- Zinc-iron alloy layers form metallurgically bonded coating
- Typical thickness: 45-85 microns

Properties:
- Excellent corrosion resistance (20+ years in many environments)
- Complete coverage including threads
- Self-healing if damaged
- Thicker coating affects dimensions

Applications:
- Outdoor construction
- Coastal environments
- Infrastructure (bridges, towers)
- Africa outdoor applications

TradeGo hot-dip galvanized fasteners meet ISO 1461/ASTM A153 specifications.

Dacromet and Geomet are advanced coatings:

Dacromet:
- Water-based coating with aluminum and zinc flakes
- Excellent corrosion resistance
- Thin coating (8-12 microns)
- No hydrogen embrittlement
- Salt spray resistance: 500-1000 hours

Geomet:
- Similar to Dacromet but without chromium
- Environmentally improved formulation
- Comparable performance

Applications:
- Automotive chassis
- Infrastructure
- Marine applications
- High-strength bolts
